title: Bryndza and Kebab Feta Cheese Quesadilla
description: A twist on traditional quesadillas with the tangy flavors of bryndza and kebab cheese.

ingredients.name: Syrian creamy cheese
ingredients.notes: Add creaminess to bryndza and kebab cheese

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
Butter one side of each tortilla.
Place one tortilla, buttered side down, in the skillet.
Sprinkle bryndza and kebab cheese on half of the tortilla.
Top with creamy cheese and fold the tortilla in half.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Repeat with the remaining tortilla and filling.
Cut into wedges and garnish with parsley.
